global_production_variables.directorial_treatment: Warm, whimsical children's picture-book adaptation: soft practical lighting, gentle camera energy, playful physical comedy for a small black-and-white dog, cozy domestic interiors, and dreamy pastel dream inserts. Keep faces and places locked; favor clear eyelines and readable bedtime-routine blocking over rapid cutting.

Character_Buster.description: Buster, a small black-and-white mixed dog with a round silly face, bright curious eyes, floppy ears, and a slightly goofy 'noodle head' expression; energetic jumper who moves like a frog; later wears matching black-and-white dog pajamas.
Character_Buster.voice_profile: Non-verbal dog: short playful yips, soft whines, happy pant-breaths, and sleepy snuffles; medium-high pitch, quick excited energy when awake, slow soft breaths when drowsy; same dog voice every scene.

Character_Mom.description: Warm, patient mother in cozy evening home clothes (soft sweater or robe), kind face, gentle hands; the household adult who guides Buster's bedtime routine.
Character_Mom.voice_profile: Adult woman, warm mid-range pitch, calm unhurried pace, soft American accent, affectionate energy with mild firmness on rules; same voice every scene.

Character_Daddy.description: Quiet father figure already in or near the parents' bed in evening clothes or sleepwear; soft presence, minimal dialogue, welcoming to the dog.
Character_Daddy.voice_profile: Adult man, low-mid pitch, soft quiet evening energy, slow relaxed pace, mild American accent; same voice every scene.

Character_Narrator.description: Off-screen storyteller presence only; not a visible on-screen person unless a brief title-card illustration style is used. Warm children's-book reader.
Character_Narrator.voice_profile: Adult storyteller, friendly mid pitch, clear playful cadence that can rhyme, gentle smile in the voice, unhurried children's-book energy; same voice every scene.

Loc_House_Main.description: Cozy contemporary family home main floor: living area opening toward a small kitchen/treat corner, soft rugs, dog toys, evening lamps.
Loc_House_Main.visual_lock: Warm lamp light, cream or soft-beige walls, low dog-eye furniture scale, a water bowl near a cabinet edge, treat jar or plate reachable by Mom, front/back door visible in deep background when needed. No harsh overhead fluorescents.

Loc_Backyard.description: Small fenced backyard at dusk/evening with bushes and a short path from the house door.
Loc_Backyard.visual_lock: Cool blue-hour outdoor light mixed with porch spill, leafy bushes along a fence, grass or mulch path, house back door with warm interior glow. Keep the same fence line and bush cluster whenever returning.

Loc_Staircase.description: Indoor staircase from main floor up toward the parents' bedroom hallway.
Loc_Staircase.visual_lock: Wooden or carpeted steps, simple banister, warm wall sconce or hallway light, family photo frames optional but consistent. Same stair run and rail profile each time.

Loc_Parents_Bedroom.description: Parents' bedroom with a large soft bed, nightstands, and dim evening lamps—Buster's final sleep destination.
Loc_Parents_Bedroom.visual_lock: Large bed with rumpled soft bedding in muted blues/creams, two nightstands, warm bedside lamps, blackout-friendly curtains, enough floor space for a dog to jump up. Keep headboard and lamp shapes consistent.

Loc_Dreamscape.description: Soft stylized dream spaces: fluffy snow fields and a sunny yard where bunnies run—clearly dreamlike, not real locations.
Loc_Dreamscape.visual_lock: Pastel, slightly soft-focus dream look; fluffy snow drifts or bright yard grass; cartoon-soft bunnies; Buster still small black-and-white. No hard real-world house architecture inside pure dream beats.

scenes.setting: Evening - House main floor - Meet Buster
scenes.dramatic_function: Introduce Buster's identity, look, and playful energy; set cozy bedtime-world tone.
scenes.summary: Narration introduces Buster the Noodle Head Dog as he bounces around the living room like a frog—small, black and white, lovable and not very bright.
scenes.continuity_notes: First appearance of Buster and Loc_House_Main; establish evening time before formal bedtime call.

music_intent.style_description: Light playful children's underscore with soft pizzicato and gentle woodwinds

story_beats.intent: Title-world open: present Buster's name and look
story_beats.visual_event: Buster sits then pops up in the warm living room, tail wagging, face toward camera in a proud silly pose; black-and-white coat clearly readable.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft house hush, distant clock tick

story_beats.visual_event: Buster springs in short frog-like hops across the rug, ears flopping, nearly tipping a soft toy.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He jumps around like a frog
story_beats.blocking_notes: Keep clear floor path for hops; camera side stays consistent left-to-right play direction.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: paw thumps on rug, happy pant

story_beats.intent: Lock size and coloring; comic not-bright beat
story_beats.visual_event: Close on Buster's small black-and-white face as he stares blankly at a simple dog toy, then tilts his head the wrong way, tongue tip out.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's small, black, and white / But not very bright!

story_beats.visual_event: Buster freezes in a proud sit, then gives one happy full-body wiggle as if taking a bow.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's Buster The Noodle Head Dog / He jumps around like a frog / He's small, black, and white / But not very bright!

scenes.setting: Evening - House main floor - Bedtime call
scenes.dramatic_function: Inciting bedtime routine: Mom calls bed; Buster wants rest but must potty outside first.
scenes.summary: Mom announces bedtime. Buster wants to rest his head, but Mom insists a doggy goes outside—Buster finds the rule nonsense.
scenes.continuity_notes: Same main-floor evening lighting as scene 1; Mom enters the established living space.

music_intent.style_description: Soft domestic underscore with a lightly comic questioning motif
music_intent.mood_arc: Cozy settle into mild confusion comedy

story_beats.visual_event: Mom stands in the living-room doorway/arch, looking down at Buster with a gentle smile, hands soft at her sides.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: It's time for bed.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster; Buster looks up at Mom; keep eyeline Mom-down / Buster-up.

story_beats.visual_event: Buster flops his furry head onto a floor cushion or rug, eyes half-closing as if ready to sleep right there.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He wants to rest his furry head

story_beats.visual_event: Buster perks, does a little potty-dance shuffle; Mom points firmly but kindly toward the door, not the floor.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Before he goes, he has to potty / Going on the floor is naughty!
must_not: Buster actually pees on the floor
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's gesture directs to exterior door; Buster glances at floor then door.

story_beats.intent: Mom states outdoor rule; Buster baffled
story_beats.visual_event: Mom leans slightly toward Buster and speaks clearly; Buster freezes with a blank noodle-head stare, head cocked, as if the words make no sense.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Mom
story_beats.dialogue: A doggy goes outside.
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster; after line, cut or hold on Buster's confused face toward Mom.

story_beats.visual_event: Extreme close on Buster's eyes blinking slowly, then a tiny confused head shake.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: That makes no sense in Buster's head!

source_excerpts.excerpt: When Momma says, "It's time for bed", / He wants to rest his furry head / Before he goes, he has to potty / Going on the floor is naughty! / "A doggy goes outside" Mom said / That makes no sense in Buster's head!

scenes.dramatic_function: Obedient outdoor potty beat; return and spin for Mom.
scenes.summary: Buster goes outside among the bushes, does his job, comes back in, and spins for Mom.
scenes.continuity_notes: Door continuity between Loc_House_Main and Loc_Backyard; Buster still without pajamas.

music_intent.style_description: Airy outdoor evening cue with light percussion steps, resolving to warm indoor chime
music_intent.mood_arc: Reluctant trek to proud little victory

story_beats.visual_event: Mom opens the back door; Buster trots out from the warm interior into the cooler blue-hour backyard.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Yet, off he goes to walk around
story_beats.blocking_notes: Door threshold shared; Buster moves interior to exterior.

story_beats.visual_event: Buster sniffs along the fence and stops at a familiar bush cluster, circling once.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Outside where bushes can be found

story_beats.visual_event: Tasteful, non-graphic potty beat: Buster turns beside the bush, body language clear he finishes, then shakes once and looks proud.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He does his job, and then comes in

story_beats.intent: Return inside and spin for Mom
story_beats.visual_event: Buster trots back through the door into the warm house and does a little celebratory spin in front of Mom.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: For Mom he does a little spin
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom faces Buster near door; Buster spins center between Mom and camera; eyeline Mom watching dog.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: happy tags on collar, soft yip

source_excerpts.excerpt: Yet, off he goes to walk around / Outside where bushes can be found / He does his job, and then comes in / For Mom he does a little spin

scenes.setting: Evening - House main floor - Treat corner
scenes.dramatic_function: Reward beat: treat and water complete the pre-sleep care routine.
scenes.summary: Buster spins for a treat; Mom lays it by his feet; he drinks water—healthy little ritual.
scenes.continuity_notes: Immediate continuation after return spin; same main floor, move toward treat/water corner.

music_intent.style_description: Sweet simple reward motif, soft glockenspiel and strings

story_beats.visual_event: Buster spins again more deliberately, eyes on Mom's hands as she holds a small dog treat.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He spins around to get a treat
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom stands at treat corner; Buster faces her.

story_beats.intent: Mom places treat by his feet
story_beats.visual_event: Mom gently lays the treat on the floor by Buster's front paws; he sniffs and eats it neatly.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: She gently lays it by his feet

story_beats.visual_event: Buster moves to his water bowl and laps water; Mom watches approvingly.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He has his drink of water too

story_beats.visual_event: Hold on content Buster with a shiny wet chin; Mom smiles; gentle pause as if sharing a healthy tip.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: This also would be good for you!

source_excerpts.excerpt: He spins around to get a treat / She gently lays it by his feet / He has his drink of water too / This also would be good for you!

scenes.setting: Evening - House main floor to staircase
scenes.dramatic_function: Transition upward: pajamas on, climb many stairs toward parents' room.
scenes.summary: Buster wears black-and-white pajamas and climbs the stairs toward Mom and Daddy's room.
scenes.continuity_notes: Buster gains black-and-white pajamas here and keeps them through sleep; stairs lead toward bedroom.

music_intent.style_description: March-soft bedtime climb theme, light piano steps ascending
music_intent.mood_arc: Playful dressing into determined little climb

story_beats.visual_event: Mom helps Buster into black-and-white dog pajamas; he stands proudly in matching sleep clothes, tail still wagging under the fabric.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Pajamas, black and white he wears
must_not: human child pajamas on dog without dog cut

story_beats.visual_event: Buster approaches the staircase and starts climbing step by step, pajamas visible, determined little body.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And then he climbs the many stairs

story_beats.visual_event: Low angle up the stair run as Buster nears the top landing; warm bedroom light spills from ahead; Mom may follow a few steps behind.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: To get to Mom and Daddy's room

story_beats.visual_event: Buster speeds the last steps with a hop, eager, as if none too soon for sleep.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: And jump in bed, and none too soon

source_excerpts.excerpt: Pajamas, black and white he wears / And then he climbs the many stairs / To get to Mom and Daddy's room / And jump in bed, and none too soon

scenes.dramatic_function: Arrival and settle: jump into parents' bed; establish he knows dreams are coming.
scenes.summary: Buster jumps into Mom and Daddy's bed. Though not smart, he knows he'll dream of snow and bunnies; bedtime wisdom that tomorrow is another day.
scenes.continuity_notes: First full Loc_Parents_Bedroom; Daddy present in bed; Buster still in black-and-white pajamas.

music_intent.style_description: Lullaby-leaning strings and soft piano, still with a hint of playful dog energy

story_beats.visual_event: Buster launches from the floor onto the big bed between or beside Mom and Daddy, landing in a soft flop of pajamas and paws.
story_beats.speaker: none
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom and Daddy already in/on bed; Buster jumps toward center; parents react with soft smiles not scolding.
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: bed springs soft thump, happy pant

story_beats.visual_event: Buster circles once on the blanket, then curls, eyes still open with a dreamy spark; Mom adjusts a corner of blanket near him.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He's not that smart, but still he knows / He'll have a dream of fluffy snows,

story_beats.visual_event: Buster's paws twitch slightly as if already rehearsing a chase; cutaway hint of imagined bunnies can begin soft at edges without full dream entry yet.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Or bunnies running 'cross the yard / And how he'll chase them very hard

story_beats.visual_event: Buster's eyelids droop; Mom or Daddy softens the lamp; the room settles quieter.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He goes to sleep because they say / Tomorrow is another day
story_beats.blocking_notes: Parents' calm presence frames the dog; no argument, only gentle routine.

source_excerpts.excerpt: He's not that smart, but still he knows / He'll have a dream of fluffy snows, / Or bunnies running 'cross the yard / And how he'll chase them very hard / He goes to sleep because they say / Tomorrow is another day

scenes.dramatic_function: Climax of comfort: dream play, fall fully asleep, Mom pets him; loved-for-keeps resolution.
scenes.summary: Dream montage of silly-dog play in snow and bunny chases; Buster sleeps warm and well-fed while Mom pets him; final snore button.
scenes.continuity_notes: Dream inserts are Loc_Dreamscape; return to same bed framing for Mom petting and final sleep. Pajamas remain on Buster in bed; dream Buster may run free without breaking identity.

music_intent.style_description: Full soft lullaby with brief playful dream middle, resolving to quiet heartbeat-like bass and fade
music_intent.mood_arc: Dream joy into deep safety and love
music_intent.vocal_style: optional soft hum, no competing lyrics under narration

story_beats.intent: Enter dream: another day for silly dogs
story_beats.visual_event: Dissolve from sleeping Buster's face into a bright dream yard where pajama-free dream-Buster runs and jumps like a frog.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Another day for silly dogs / To run and play and jump like frogs

story_beats.visual_event: Dream-Buster bounds through fluffy snow drifts, nose dusted white, joyful leaps.
story_beats.speaker: none

story_beats.visual_event: Soft bunnies dash across dream-yard grass; Buster chases hard but happily, never mean, ears flying.
story_beats.speaker: none

story_beats.visual_event: Dissolve back to real bed: Buster lays down his head on the blanket, body heavy and still, warm under soft covers.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: He falls asleep, lays down his head / He's warm and soft and quite well-fed

story_beats.intent: Mom pets him; loved for keeps
story_beats.visual_event: Mom's hand gently pets Buster's head and neck while he sleeps; Daddy rests nearby; the family bed feels safe and complete.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: His Mommy pets him while he sleeps / This noodle head is loved for keeps.....
story_beats.blocking_notes: Mom's hand enters from her side of bed; Buster does not wake; tender slow petting.

story_beats.visual_event: Hold on Buster's peaceful sleeping face; tiny snore rhythm; lights dim further; end image of the loved noodle-head dog.
story_beats.speaker: Character_Narrator
story_beats.dialogue: Zzzzzzzzzz
story_beats.ambient_or_sfx: soft dog snore, room tone fade

source_excerpts.excerpt: Another day for silly dogs / To run and play and jump like frogs / He falls asleep, lays down his head / He's warm and soft and quite well-fed / His Mommy pets him while he sleeps / This noodle head is loved for keeps.....

source_book_title: Buster the Noodle Head Dog Goes to Bed
